ref: Isn't he the son of the carpenter? Isn't Mary his mother, and aren't James, Joseph, Simon, and Judas his brothers?
text: Má kampenta n wa n lɛɛ? Má i ni la Mariya a? Má Yakobo, ni Yosefu, ni Simon, ni Yudasi n gɔrɔ n lɛɛ?
translated: Isn't this the carpenter's son? Isn't his mother's name Mary, and aren't his brothers James, Joseph, Simon and Judas?

ref: When they came to Jesus, they saw the man who had once been full of demons. He was sitting there with his clothes on and in his right mind, and they were terrified.
text: Na ba ba Yesu dɔ, na ba ŋu sɔnɔ n bo ajinim n yo woori i ŋu n ka i tana Yesu bi wura tanlɛɛ, ni i nyunu koroya su, na sɛrɛ ati bu.
translated: When they saw Jesus, they ran to tell the news to the people in the town that Jesus, the son of God, had come, and that he was going to the river, and they all followed him.

ref: Servants are fortunate if their master comes and finds them doing their job.
text: Nzɛn i mibiɛ n ba ŋuuri ka i suyo i juma kabo i seeri ka i yo ni, tere­fiɛ wo nyini akɔɔ n dɔ.
translated: When I was a child my father took me and showed me the forest and told me that, this forest is full of evil spirits.

ref: When the young man heard this, he went away sad, because he was very rich.
text: Saŋga bo gbɛfɛnɛ n tiiri nyini sɔ ni, na wɔ yasu akɔ ni ahoresaaki, dama i la neŋge agaya n dɛɛ ti.
translated: The woman and the man are in the house, and they are sharing the property, because it is for all of them.

ref: You disobey God's commands in order to obey what humans have taught.
text: Na Yesu ase bu ka, “Am acɛ Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ maa­wa n ase buekun, na am nya susu adamande dɛɛ sa­yoo­wam su.”
translated: And Jesus said to them, "I will make you fishers of men, and you will catch many people for salvation."
